title: How can I test a draft version of my monday.com app without making it Live?
excerpt: I’m building an application and I want to install and test my draft version in my private workspace account without promoting the application to Live. I can’t find any option in the Developer Center or on my boards to “I…

posts.author: oransherf (Oran)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m building an application and I want to install and test my draft version in my private workspace account without promoting the application to Live. I can’t find any option in the Developer Center or on my boards to “Install Draft Version”. How it can be done? Thank you!

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
You don’t need to install it. You will see the draft version as a separate app feature in the relevant feature center.

For example, in the integrations center:

image2842×1290 260 KB

Or when you try to add a custom object to the leftpane:

image1650×1156 91.9 KB
